name: entroly
description: Entroly-Daemon: Self-Evolving Daemon. Compress 2M-token repos into a razor-sharp Principal Engineer's context. 85–99% fewer tokens, 100% accuracy retention (verified by live API benchmarks). Built for Cursor, Claude Code, Opus, Codex, GPT & Custom Providers.
summaryZh: Entroly-Daemon: Self-Evolving Daemon. Compress 2M-token repos into a razor-sharp Principal Engineer's context. 85–99% fewer tokens, 100% accuracy retention (verified by live API benchmarks). Built for Cursor, Claude Code, Opus, Codex, GPT & Custom Providers. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
